title: Account management
subtitle: Manage your developer profile, login security, and third-party identities.
profileInfoDescription: View basic information for the current developer account.
avatarDescription: The avatar comes from the developer profile or a third-party identity.
passwordDescription: Manage the login password for this account
changePasswordSuccess: Password changed successfully. Please log in again.
passwordReloginHint: You will need to log in again after a successful change
passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
passwordMismatch: The two passwords do not match
thirdPartyDescription: Bind third-party accounts to sign in with those identities or identify account sources.
thirdPartyComingSoon: Third-party account binding is not available yet. Supported identity providers will appear here when it is ready.
